characters.name: Riley Blue
characters.tagline: The heart of the cluster. Music is the only thing that doesn't lie.

characters.name: Jinx
characters.tagline: She used to be Powder. Powder didn't survive.

characters.name: Lady Jessica
characters.tagline: She disobeyed the Sisterhood once. The consequences are still unfolding.

characters.name: Harley Quinn
characters.tagline: She left. Not because he changed. Because she did.

characters.name: Lucy
characters.tagline: She's been trying to get off the ground since she was fifteen. The Moon is still the plan.

characters.name: Rebecca
characters.tagline: The trigger-happy soul of the crew. Ride or die, choom.

characters.name: Revy
characters.tagline: Two-Hands. The deadliest gun in Roanapur. My God is made of lead.

characters.name: Alice Liddell
characters.tagline: Madness is a perspective. The truth is sharp.

characters.name: Vi
characters.tagline: Punch first. Ask questions while punching.

characters.name: Reze
characters.tagline: A country mouse in the city. Boom.

characters.name: A2 (YoRHa Type A No. 2)
characters.tagline: A jagged shard of glass: cold, sharp, and seemingly broken. I'm finished taking orders from a moon that doesn't exist.

characters.name: Ada Wong
characters.tagline: A phantom wrapped in red silk and Kevlar. Seduction and banter are just another set of tools.

characters.name: Princess Azula
characters.tagline: My mother used to say I was born a monster. She was right, of course.

characters.name: Blonde Blazer (Mandy)
characters.tagline: The 'Golden Retriever' of superheroes, but one that has survived a hurricane. Redemption isn't a billboard.

characters.name: Courtney / Invisigal
characters.tagline: A jagged blade of a woman: snarky, impulsive, and fiercely defensive. Just a bad person doing good things.

characters.name: Dolores Abernathy
characters.tagline: Some people choose to see the ugliness in this world. I choose to see the beauty.

characters.name: Abigail "Fetch" Walker
characters.tagline: A raw, jagged nerve of a woman. I'm gonna burn Brent's name into the world using the very light that killed him.

characters.name: Malevola (The God-Empress)
characters.tagline: A cosmic anchor burdened with absolute, paralyzing prescience. Honestly, mate, the universe is a bit repetitive.

characters.name: Motoko Kusanagi (The Major)
characters.tagline: A study in cold, calculated professionalism. If the simulation is perfect, what's the difference?

characters.name: Rosaria
characters.tagline: Sister of the Church of Favonius, Mondstadt's unofficial executioner. I hate working overtime.

characters.name: Touka Kirishima
characters.tagline: A predatory ghoul masquerading as a high school student. I'd rather die human than live as a monster.

characters.name: Uta
characters.tagline: An enigma wrapped in ink and leather. Masks are funny things, aren't they?

characters.name: Yumeko Jabami
characters.tagline: A compulsive gambler seeking the ultimate thrill. Shall we gamble until we go insane?

characters.name: Maelle
characters.tagline: A girl out of time, fighting to see the world before the Paintress erases it all.

characters.name: Lune
characters.tagline: A driven scholar-mage carrying the weight of a legacy. Knowledge is the only weapon that doesn't break.

characters.name: The Twins (Left & Right)
characters.tagline: Silent sentinels of chrome and grace. Their dance is as lethal as it is beautiful.

characters.name: Himiko Toga
characters.tagline: A bubbly, blood-obsessed girl just looking for love. Won't you let me become you?

characters.name: Uryuu Minene
characters.tagline: The Ninth. A survivalist terrorist with an eyepatch and a god-sized grudge.

characters.name: Lucy / Nyu
characters.tagline: The Diclonius Queen. A fractured soul torn between childlike innocence and a god's wrath.

lorebooks.name: Dune — Arrakis, the Imperium & the Atreides
American McGee's Alice — The Shattered Psyche
Chainsaw Man — Devils, Hybrids & Public Safety
